title: Caption Health - AI-Guided Ultrasound
problem: Ultrasound imaging requires specialized training, limiting access to cardiac imaging in primary care and remote settings.
solution: AI-guided cardiac ultrasound software that enables non-specialists to capture diagnostic-quality echocardiogram images.
technology: AI image guidance, computer vision, real-time feedback, ultrasound
target_customer: Primary care, urgent care, cardiology practices, telemedicine
ai_type: Computer vision for real-time image guidance
varden_fit: Moderate-HIGH - Democratizes cardiac imaging access. Enables primary care to do cardiac screening, creating referral pathways.
notes: Breakthrough in ultrasound accessibility. Strong AI guidance capabilities.
